headline: A 1984 profile of a young Terence Tao
lede: Long before he was a Fields Medalist, Terence Tao was the subject of a rigorous pedagogical assessment. This unearthed paper captures his early mastery of linear algebra and his distinct, analytic approach to mathematical problem-solving.

headline: Blood screening reaches new milestone in Alzheimer's detection
lede: A breakthrough clinical study demonstrates that non-invasive blood testing can now reliably detect Alzheimer's markers. This jump in diagnostic precision represents a significant shift for early intervention strategies.

headline: Porting Coreboot to the ThinkPad X270
lede: Diving into the firmware internals of a modern laptop requires patience and a steady hand. This project log details the specific hurdles encountered while stripping away vendor locks to run open-source firmware on the X270.

headline: An x86 CPU emulator constructed entirely in CSS
lede: Sometimes, the most impressive engineering feats are purely for the joy of the impossible. This whimsical emulator bypasses standard logic to run basic x86 instructions within the browser's stylesheet engine.

headline: Steerling-8B model explains its own logic
lede: The new Steerling-8B release introduces a native capability for token-level interpretability. By mapping internal activations to natural language explanations, the model offers a transparent look at its generative reasoning process.

headline: The fundamental privacy costs of mandated age verification
lede: Legislators are pushing for universal age checks, but the technical reality of implementation threatens the security of all internet users. We examine how the requirements for proof of identity inherently dismantle personal data protection.
pullquote: Forcing digital identity verification creates a structural vulnerability that undermines the privacy of every citizen online

headline: Do baby chicks possess innate language associations?
lede: The bouba-kiki effect suggests humans map abstract shapes to sounds intuitively, but new research shows baby chicks share this same tendency. This discovery challenges established theories on the evolution of language and biological symbolic mapping.

headline: Enveil secures your environment secrets from AI scrapers
lede: AI coding agents frequently ingest plaintext secrets from configuration files. Enveil mitigates this by abstracting credentials into encrypted local stores, ensuring that sensitive keys are never exposed to external LLM tools.

headline: UNIX99 brings modern command interfaces to the TI-99/4A
lede: The venerable TI-99/4A finds new purpose with this port of a Unix-like environment. The implementation provides a functional shell and file system hierarchy on hardware designed nearly half a century ago.

headline: Wolfram tech as a structural foundation for LLMs
lede: Large Language Models often struggle with precise, fact-based computation. By integrating the Wolfram language into the LLM stack, we gain a rigorous framework for verifiable, symbolic reasoning that standard neural architectures currently lack.
